controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish to rbi a proforma balance sheet (unaudited) as on march 31 of the year and the statutory returns due on the said date
controls.control_description:
Explanation - Even in a case where RBI and the Registrar of Companies grant
extension of time, the NBFC shall furnish to RBI a proforma balance sheet
(unaudited) as on March 31 of the year and the statutory returns due on the
said date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish to rbi a proforma balance sheet (unaudited) as on march 31 of the year and the statutory returns due on the said date

controls.control_objective: To ensure finalise its balance sheet within a period of 3 months from the date to which it pertains
controls.control_description:
Every NBFC shall finalise its balance sheet within a period of 3
months from the date to which it pertains.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to finalise its balance sheet within a period of 3 months from the date to which it pertains

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - financial statements: presentation and disclosures) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - financial statements: presentation and disclosures) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to following non-banking financial companies, (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as an nbfc), for all layers
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to following Non-Banking Financial
Companies, (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as
an NBFC), for all layers, unless specified otherwise:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to following non-banking financial companies, (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as an nbfc), for all layers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to standalone primary dealer (spd) registered with the rbi as nbfc under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to standalone primary dealer (spd) registered with the rbi as nbfc under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to mortgage guarantee company (mgc) registered with rbi under the scheme of registration of mortgage guarantee companies, as per layer-
controls.control_description:
These Directions except provisions contained in Paragraph 20 shall be
applicable to Mortgage Guarantee Company (MGC) registered with RBI under
the scheme of Registration of Mortgage Guarantee Companies, as per layer-
wise applicability;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to mortgage guarantee company (mgc) registered with rbi under the scheme of registration of mortgage guarantee companies, as per layer-

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to nbfc-peer to peer lending platforms (nbfc-p2p) registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
These Directions except provisions contained in Paragraph 13 to 15 and
Paragraph 20 shall be applicable to NBFC-Peer to Peer Lending Platforms
(NBFC-P2P) registered with the RBI under the provisions of the RBI Act, 1934,
subject to layer-wise applicability.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to nbfc-peer to peer lending platforms (nbfc-p2p) registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to nbfc-account aggregator (nbfc-aa) registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
These Directions except provisions contained in Paragraph 13 to 15 and
Paragraph 20 shall be applicable to NBFC-Account Aggregator (NBFC-AA)
registered with the RBI under the provisions of the RBI Act, 1934, subject to
layer-wise applicability.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to nbfc-account aggregator (nbfc-aa) registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare its balance sheet and profit and loss account, as prescribed under the companies act, 2013, as on march 31 every year
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall prepare its balance sheet and profit and loss account, as
prescribed under the Companies Act, 2013, as on March 31 every year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare its balance sheet and profit and loss account, as prescribed under the companies act, 2013, as on march 31 every year

controls.control_objective: To ensure take prior approval of the reserve bank before approaching the registrar of companies for this purpose
controls.control_description:
Whenever an NBFC intends to extend the date of its balance sheet, as per
provisions of the Companies Act, 2013, it shall take prior approval of the
Reserve Bank before approaching the Registrar of Companies for this purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take prior approval of the reserve bank before approaching the registrar of companies for this purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare its financial statements in accordance with ind as notified by the government of india and shall comply with the regulatory guidance specified
controls.control_description:
An NBFC covered by Rule 4 of the Companies (Indian Accounting Standards)
Rules, 2015, ('Ind AS') shall prepare its financial statements in accordance with
Ind AS notified by the Government of India and shall comply with the regulatory
guidance specified in paragraph 11 and paragraph 12 of this Master Direction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare its financial statements in accordance with ind as notified by the government of india and shall comply with the regulatory guidance specified

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the requirements of accounting standards notified under the companies (accounting standards) rules, 2021, as amended from time to time, in
controls.control_description:
Other NBFCs shall comply with the requirements of Accounting Standards
notified under the Companies (Accounting Standards) Rules, 2021, as
amended from time to time, in so far as they are not inconsistent with any of
Directions / Guidelines issued by RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the requirements of accounting standards notified under the companies (accounting standards) rules, 2021, as amended from time to time, in

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to instructions given in the following paragraphs
controls.control_description:
An NBFC that is required to comply with Ind AS shall adhere to instructions
given in the following paragraphs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to instructions given in the following paragraphs

controls.control_objective: To ensure to refer to <image> the notified accounting standards, application guidance, educational material and other clarifications issued by the institute of
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, with
respect to matters not dealt in these Directions, an NBFC is required to refer to
<image>
the notified accounting standards, application guidance, educational material
and other clarifications issued by the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India
(ICAI).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to refer to <image> the notified accounting standards, application guidance, educational material and other clarifications issued by the institute of

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply a default definition that is consistent with the definition used for internal credit risk management purposes for the relevant financial instrum
controls.control_description:
1) Governance Framework
Note - Paragraph B5.5.37 of Ind AS 109 states that "…an entity shall
apply a default definition that is consistent with the definition used for
internal credit risk management purposes for the relevant financial
instrument and consider qualitative indicators (for example, financial
covenants) when appropriate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply a default definition that is consistent with the definition used for internal credit risk management purposes for the relevant financial instrum

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applied consistently to all financial instruments unless information becomes available that demonstrates that another default definition is more ap
controls.control_description:
The
definition of default used for these purposes shall be applied consistently
to all financial instruments unless information becomes available that
demonstrates that another default definition is more appropriate for a
particular financial instrument."
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applied consistently to all financial instruments unless information becomes available that demonstrates that another default definition is more ap

controls.control_objective: To ensure also articulate the objectives for managing each portfolio
controls.control_description:
The NBFC shall also articulate the objectives for managing
each portfolio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also articulate the objectives for managing each portfolio

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame its policy for sales out of amortised cost business model portfolios and disclose the same in its notes to financial statements
controls.control_description:
(ii) An NBFC shall frame its policy for sales out of amortised cost business
model portfolios and disclose the same in its notes to financial statements.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame its policy for sales out of amortised cost business model portfolios and disclose the same in its notes to financial statements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be documented
controls.control_description:
The parameters and
assumptions considered as well as their sensitivity to the ECL output
should be documented.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be documented

controls.control_objective: To ensure make changes in the parameters, assumptions and other aspects of its ecl model for the purposes of profit smoothening
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall not make changes in the
parameters, assumptions and other aspects of its ECL model for the
purposes of profit smoothening.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make changes in the parameters, assumptions and other aspects of its ecl model for the purposes of profit smoothening

controls.control_objective: To ensure be documented and approved by the board
controls.control_description:
The rationale and justification for any
change in the ECL model shall be documented and approved by the
Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be documented and approved by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly documented and approved by the audit committee of the board (acb)
controls.control_description:
Similarly, the rationale and basis of any adjustments to the model
output (i.e., a management overlay) shall be clearly documented and
approved by the Audit Committee of the Board (ACB).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly documented and approved by the audit committee of the board (acb)

controls.control_objective: To ensure draw reference to 'guidance on credit risk and accounting for <image> expected credit losses' issued by basel committee on banking supervision (bcbs)
controls.control_description:
Note - An NBFC /
ARC may draw reference to 'Guidance on Credit Risk and Accounting for
<image>
Expected Credit Losses' issued by Basel Committee on Banking
Supervision (BCBS) in December 2015, which is structured around 11
principles out of which first eight principles deal with supervisory guidance
and inter-alia cover Board / Senior Management's responsibilities,
adoption of sound methodologies for credit risk measurement, disclosure
requirements etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to draw reference to 'guidance on credit risk and accounting for <image> expected credit losses' issued by basel committee on banking supervision (bcbs)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly documented and approved by the acb
controls.control_description:
The rationale for classification of accounts that are past due
beyond 90 days but not treated as impaired shall be clearly documented
and approved by the ACB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly documented and approved by the acb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disclosed in the notes to the financial statements
controls.control_description:
Further, the number of such accounts and the
total amount outstanding and the overdue amounts shall be disclosed in
the notes to the financial statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disclosed in the notes to the financial statements

controls.control_objective: To ensure separately disclose in its balance sheet the provisions made as per the reserve bank's guidelines without netting them from the income or against the
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall separately disclose in its balance sheet the provisions made as
per the Reserve Bank's guidelines without netting them from the income or
against the value of assets.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to separately disclose in its balance sheet the provisions made as per the reserve bank's guidelines without netting them from the income or against the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distinctly indicated under separate heads of account as under:
controls.control_description:
Provisions, created by an NBFC, shall be distinctly indicated under separate
heads of account as under:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distinctly indicated under separate heads of account as under:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be appropriated from the general provisions and loss reserves held
controls.control_description:
Provisions shall not be appropriated from the general provisions and loss
reserves held, if any, by the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be appropriated from the general provisions and loss reserves held

controls.control_objective: To ensure be debited to the profit and loss account
controls.control_description:
Provisions for each year shall be debited to
the profit and loss account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be debited to the profit and loss account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be written back without making adjustment against them
controls.control_description:
The excess of provisions, if any, held under the
heads general provisions and loss reserves may be written back without
making adjustment against them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be written back without making adjustment against them

controls.control_objective: To ensure make disclosures in its financial statements in accordance with the guidelines in these directions, applicable accounting standards, laws and regulati
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall make disclosures in its financial statements in accordance with
the guidelines in these Directions, applicable accounting standards, laws and
regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to make disclosures in its financial statements in accordance with the guidelines in these directions, applicable accounting standards, laws and regulati

controls.control_objective: To ensure omit those line items / disclosures which are not applicable / not permitted or with no exposure / no transaction both in the current year and previou
controls.control_description:
An individual NBFC may omit those line
items / disclosures which are not applicable / not permitted or with no exposure
/ no transaction both in the current year and previous year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to omit those line items / disclosures which are not applicable / not permitted or with no exposure / no transaction both in the current year and previou

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the extant statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an activity or transaction
controls.control_description:
It may be noted that mere mention of an activity, transaction or item in the
disclosure template does not imply that it is permitted, and an NBFC shall refer
to the extant statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the
permissibility or otherwise of an activity or transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the extant statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an activity or transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose comparative information in respect of the previous period for all amounts reported in the current period's financial statements
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall disclose comparative information in respect of the previous
period for all amounts reported in the current period's financial statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose comparative information in respect of the previous period for all amounts reported in the current period's financial statements

controls.control_objective: To ensure include comparative information for narrative and descriptive information if it is relevant to understanding the current period's financial statements
controls.control_description:
Further, the NBFC shall include comparative information for narrative and
descriptive information if it is relevant to understanding the current period's
financial statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include comparative information for narrative and descriptive information if it is relevant to understanding the current period's financial statements

controls.control_objective: To ensure append to its balance sheet as prescribed under the companies act, 2013, the particulars in the schedule as per format given in
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall append to its balance sheet as prescribed under the
Companies Act, 2013, the particulars in the schedule as per format given in
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to append to its balance sheet as prescribed under the companies act, 2013, the particulars in the schedule as per format given in

controls.control_objective: To ensure make following disclosures in 'notes to accounts' to the financial statements
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall make following disclosures in 'Notes to Accounts' to the
financial statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make following disclosures in 'notes to accounts' to the financial statements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025, as amended from time to tim
controls.control_description:
NBFC shall be guided by
the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets)
Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025, as amended from time to tim

(3) Non-Fund Based (NFB) Credit Facilities:
An NBFC shall disclose the details of NFB credit facilities in the format given
below.

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force from april 1, 2026, or from any earlier date as decided by an nbfc as per its internal policy ("effective date")
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall come into force from April 1, 2026, or from any earlier date as
decided by an NBFC as per its internal policy ("effective date").
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to come into force from april 1, 2026, or from any earlier date as decided by an nbfc as per its internal policy ("effective date")

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed in terms of these directions
controls.control_description:
Extension of any new NFB
facility and renewal of an existing NFB facility after the effective date, shall be governed in
terms of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed in terms of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the existing instructions as applicable to the respective bank
controls.control_description:
All existing NFB facilities extended/ renewed till the effective date
shall be governed by the existing instructions as applicable to the respective bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the existing instructions as applicable to the respective bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - transfer and distribution of credit risk) directions, 2025, as amended from
controls.control_description:
(4) Disclosures on Co-Lending Arrangements
Note: As regards CLA, the NBFC shall be guided by the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025, as amended
from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - transfer and distribution of credit risk) directions, 2025, as amended from

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force from january 1, 2026, or from any earlier date as decided by an nbfc as per its internal policy ("effective date")
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall come into force from January 1, 2026, or from any
earlier date as decided by an NBFC as per its internal policy ("effective date").
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to come into force from january 1, 2026, or from any earlier date as decided by an nbfc as per its internal policy ("effective date")

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in compliance with these directions
controls.control_description:
Any new CLA
entered into after the effective date shall be in compliance with these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in compliance with these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide table separately for 'simple, transparent and comparable' (stc) and non-stc transactions
controls.control_description:
(5) Disclosures relating to securitisation
Note - An NBFC shall provide table separately for 'Simple, Transparent and Comparable'
(STC) and non-STC transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide table separately for 'simple, transparent and comparable' (stc) and non-stc transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure invariably provide the figures for both the current and previous year to facilitate comparison
controls.control_description:
Note: While making disclosures in audited annual financial statements, an NBFC should
invariably provide the figures for both the current and previous year to facilitate comparison.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invariably provide the figures for both the current and previous year to facilitate comparison

controls.control_objective: To ensure be, has been invoked due to change in scope and size of the project
controls.control_description: Out of '5', accounts in respect of which resolution process involving extension in original / extended DCCO, as the case may be, has been invoked due to change in scope and size of the project.

controls.control_description:
No Item Description Number of
accounts
(in ₹ crore)

controls.control_objective: To ensure omit those line items which are not applicable / not permitted or have nil exposure both in current and previous year
controls.control_description:
Category III
Total exposure to capital market
Note - An NBFC may omit those line items which are not applicable / not permitted or have nil
exposure both in current and previous year.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown separately under the respective line items
controls.control_description:
Further, exposures against pledge of shares by
promoters of a company shall be shown separately under the respective line items.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown separately under the respective line items

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on the sector-wise and industry-wise bank credit (sibc) return submitted by scheduled commercial banks to the reserve bank and published by r
controls.control_description:
The disclosures as above shall be based on the sector-wise and industry-wise bank credit
(SIBC) return submitted by scheduled commercial banks to the Reserve Bank and published by
Reserve Bank as 'Sectoral Deployment of Bank Credit'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on the sector-wise and industry-wise bank credit (sibc) return submitted by scheduled commercial banks to the reserve bank and published by r

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disclosed separately within that sector
controls.control_description:
In the disclosures as above, if within a sector, exposure to a specific sub-sector / industry is
more than 10 per cent of Tier 1 Capital of an NBFC, the same shall be disclosed separately
within that sector.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disclosed separately within that sector

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clubbed and disclosed as "others" within that sector
controls.control_description:
Further, within a sector, if exposure to specific sub-sector / industry is less
than 10 per cent of Tier 1 Capital, such exposures shall be clubbed and disclosed as "Others"
within that sector.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clubbed and disclosed as "others" within that sector

An NBFC shall disclose the accounting policies regarding key areas of
operations at one place along with 'Notes to Accounts' in its financial
statements.

Companies Act, 2013, including with respect to compliance with accounting and
secretarial standards shall be disclosed.

An NBFC shall disclose in public domain and in 'Notes to Accounts', the details

statutory / regulatory authority.

Further, directions on the basis of inspection
reports or other adverse findings shall also be disclosed in the public domain.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be disclosed in the public domain

controls.control_objective: To ensure form part of the annual report to the shareholders
controls.control_description:
(vii) Management discussion and analysis report
As part of the Directors' report or as an addition thereto, a Management
Discussion and Analysis report shall form part of the Annual Report to the
shareholders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to form part of the annual report to the shareholders

controls.control_objective: To ensure include discussion on the following matters within the limits set by the company's competitive position:
controls.control_description:
This Management Discussion & Analysis shall include discussion
on the following matters within the limits set by the company's competitive
position:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include discussion on the following matters within the limits set by the company's competitive position:

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose all instances of breach of covenant of loan availed or debt securities issued
controls.control_description:
<image>
8) Breach of covenant
An NBFC shall disclose all instances of breach of covenant of loan availed or
debt securities issued.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose all instances of breach of covenant of loan availed or debt securities issued

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose details of divergence as per the table given below
controls.control_description:
9) Divergence in Asset Classification and Provisioning
An NBFC shall disclose details of divergence as per the table given below, if
either or both of the following conditions are satisfied:
a) the additional provisioning requirements assessed by the Reserve Bank
exceeds five percent of the reported profits before tax and impairment
loss on financial instruments for the reference period, or
b) the additional Gross NPAs identified by RBI exceeds five per cent of the
reported Gross NPAs for the reference period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose details of divergence as per the table given below

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose registration / license / authorisation, by whatever name called, obtained from other financial sector regulators
controls.control_description:
Adjusted (notional) Net Profit after Tax (PAT) for the year ended March 31, 20XX after considering the divergence in provisioning
* March 31, 20XX is the close of the reference period in respect of which divergences were assessed
<image>
10) Registration from other financial sector regulators
An NBFC shall disclose registration / license / authorisation, by whatever name
called, obtained from other financial sector regulators.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose registration / license / authorisation, by whatever name called, obtained from other financial sector regulators

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be disclosed
controls.control_description:
11) Area of Operation
Information namely, area, country of operation and joint venture partners with
regard to joint ventures and overseas subsidiaries shall also be disclosed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be disclosed

controls.control_objective: To ensure make disclosure of ratings assigned by credit rating agencies to it and migration of its ratings during the year
controls.control_description:
12) Disclosure of ratings
An NBFC shall make disclosure of ratings assigned by Credit Rating Agencies
to it and migration of its ratings during the year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make disclosure of ratings assigned by credit rating agencies to it and migration of its ratings during the year

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose all pecuniary relationship or transactions of the non- executive directors vis-à-vis the company
controls.control_description:
13) Remuneration of Directors
An NBFC shall disclose all pecuniary relationship or transactions of the non-
executive directors vis-à-vis the company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose all pecuniary relationship or transactions of the non- executive directors vis-à-vis the company

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made by an nbfc
controls.control_description:
14) Net Profit or Loss for the period, prior period items and changes in
accounting policies
Since the format of the Profit and Loss account does not specifically provide for
disclosure of the impact of prior period items on the current year's profit and
loss, such disclosures, wherever warranted, shall be made by an NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made by an nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose the circumstances in which revenue recognition has been postponed pending the resolution of significant uncertainties
controls.control_description:
15) Revenue Recognition
An NBFC shall disclose the circumstances in which revenue recognition has
been postponed pending the resolution of significant uncertainties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose the circumstances in which revenue recognition has been postponed pending the resolution of significant uncertainties

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose details of provisions and contingencies in following format
controls.control_description:
16) Provisions and contingencies
An NBFC shall disclose details of provisions and contingencies in following
format.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose details of provisions and contingencies in following format

controls.control_objective: To ensure make suitable disclosures regarding any draw down of reserves

17) Draw down from Reserves
An NBFC shall make suitable disclosures regarding any draw down of
reserves.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make suitable disclosures regarding any draw down of reserves

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - asset liability management) directions, 2025, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
18) Concentration of deposits, advances, exposures and NPAs
Note: NBFC shall be guided by the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Asset
Liability Management) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time, for associated guidelines on
asset liability management including LCR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - asset liability management) directions, 2025, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made in the balance sheet regarding transactions
controls.control_description:
24) Currency Options
Disclosures shall be made in the balance sheet regarding transactions, if any,
undertaken in the designated currency options exchanges recognized by SEBI, in
accordance with the guidelines issued by SEBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made in the balance sheet regarding transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide details of details of all off-balance sheet exposures and structured products issued by it
controls.control_description:

22) Off-balance sheet exposures and structured products
An NBFC shall provide details of details of all off-balance sheet exposures and
structured products issued by it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide details of details of all off-balance sheet exposures and structured products issued by it

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to non-deposit taking nbfcs with asset size below ₹5000 crore, core investment companies (cics), and spds
controls.control_description:
23) Disclosure on Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR)
Provisions of this Paragraph shall not apply to non-deposit taking NBFCs with asset
size below ₹5000 crore, Core Investment Companies (CICs), and SPDs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to non-deposit taking nbfcs with asset size below ₹5000 crore, core investment companies (cics), and spds

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the following lcr disclosure standards:
controls.control_description: An NBFC shall adhere to the following LCR Disclosure standards:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the following lcr disclosure standards:

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose information on its lcr covering all the four quarters of relevant financial year (whether audited or otherwise) in the template given below
controls.control_description:
(i) An NBFC shall disclose information on its LCR covering all the four quarters of
relevant financial year (whether audited or otherwise) in the template given
below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose information on its lcr covering all the four quarters of relevant financial year (whether audited or otherwise) in the template given below

controls.control_objective: To ensure be presented as simple averages of daily observations over the previous quarter (i
controls.control_description:
(ii) Data must be presented as simple averages of daily observations over the
previous quarter (i.e., the average is calculated over a period of 90 days).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be presented as simple averages of daily observations over the previous quarter (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide sufficient qualitative discussion (in its annual financial statements under 'notes to accounts') around the lcr to facilitate understanding of
controls.control_description:
(iii) In addition to the disclosures required by the template given below, the NBFC
shall provide sufficient qualitative discussion (in its annual financial statements
under 'Notes to Accounts') around the LCR to facilitate understanding of the
results and data provided.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide sufficient qualitative discussion (in its annual financial statements under 'notes to accounts') around the lcr to facilitate understanding of

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated after the application of respective haircuts (for hqla) and stress factors on inflow and outflow
controls.control_description:
$Weighted values must be calculated after the application of respective haircuts (for HQLA) and stress
factors on inflow and outflow.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated after the application of respective haircuts (for hqla) and stress factors on inflow and outflow

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mandatorily listed within three years of identification as nbfc-ul
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-UL shall be mandatorily listed within three years of identification as
NBFC-UL.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mandatorily listed within three years of identification as nbfc-ul

controls.control_objective: To ensure draw up a board approved roadmap for compliance with the disclosure requirements of a listed company under the securities and exchange board of india
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, upon being identified as NBFC-UL, an unlisted NBFC-
UL shall draw up a Board approved roadmap for compliance with the disclosure
requirements of a listed company under the Securities and Exchange Board of
India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 (as
amended from time to time).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to draw up a board approved roadmap for compliance with the disclosure requirements of a listed company under the securities and exchange board of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to nbfc-ul which are fully owned and controlled by government
controls.control_description:
3[Provided that these provisions shall not be applicable to NBFC-UL which are
fully owned and controlled by Government.]
3 Inserted vide Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 dated June 24, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to nbfc-ul which are fully owned and controlled by government

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by general clarifications issued by the icai from time to time
controls.control_description:
An NBFC may be guided by general clarifications issued by the ICAI from time
to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by general clarifications issued by the icai from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure consolidate the financial statements of all subsidiaries - domestic as well as foreign
controls.control_description:
A parent company, presenting the consolidated financial statements
(CFS), shall consolidate the financial statements of all subsidiaries - domestic
as well as foreign.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consolidate the financial statements of all subsidiaries - domestic as well as foreign

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disclosed in the cfs
controls.control_description:
The reasons for not consolidating a subsidiary shall be
disclosed in the CFS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disclosed in the cfs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included or not for consolidation would be that of the management of the parent entity
controls.control_description:
The responsibility of determining whether a particular
entity shall be included or not for consolidation would be that of the
management of the parent entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included or not for consolidation would be that of the management of the parent entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure incorporate their comments in this regard in the "auditors report"
controls.control_description:
In case, its Statutory Auditors are of the
opinion that an entity which ought to have been consolidated has been omitted,
they shall incorporate their comments in this regard in the "Auditors Report".
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to incorporate their comments in this regard in the "auditors report"

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior
to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: a
controls.control_description:
Further, the repeal of these directions,
instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially affect:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy
may be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty,
forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions,
instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable as prescribed in these directions
controls.control_description: Provisioning norms shall be applicable as prescribed in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable as prescribed in these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disclosed irrespective of whether they are classified as long term (amortised cost in the case of ind as) or current (fair value in the case of ind
controls.control_description: However, market value in respect of quoted investments and break up / fair value / NAV in respect of unquoted investments shall be disclosed irrespective of whether they are classified as long term (amortised cost in the case of Ind AS) or current (fair value in the case of Ind AS) in (5) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disclosed irrespective of whether they are classified as long term (amortised cost in the case of ind as) or current (fair value in the case of ind
